This project focuses on adapting these models using PEFT, Adapter V2, and LoRA techniques to efficiently and accurately extract drug names and adverse side-effects from pharmaceutical texts

items.description: Scripts of LLM pre-training and fine-tuning (w/wo LoRA, DeepSpeed)

items.name: MM-UPT
items.description: [NeurIPS 2025] First SFT, Second RL, Third UPT: Continual Improving Multi-Modal LLM Reasoning via Unsupervised Post-Training

items.name: Disentangling-Memory-and-Reasoning
items.description: [ACL'25] We propose a novel fine-tuning method, Separate Memory and Reasoning, which combines prompt tuning with LoRA.

items.name: FinetuneGLMWithPeft
items.description: Simple implementation of using lora form the peft library to fine-tune the chatglm-6b

items.name: BERT-LoRA-TensorRT
items.description: This repository contains a custom implementation of the BERT model, fine-tuned for specific tasks, along with an implementation of Low Rank Approximation (LoRA). The models are optimized for high performance using NVIDIA's TensorRT.

items.name: Finetune_GPT-J_6B_8-bit
items.description: Fine-tuning GPT-J-6B on colab or equivalent PC GPU with your custom datasets: 8-bit weights with low-rank adaptors (LoRA)

items.name: learning-from-rewards-llm-papers
items.description: A comrephensive collection of learning from rewards in the post-training and test-time scaling of LLMs, with a focus on both reward models and learning strategies across training, inference, and post-inference stages.

items.name: gpt-j-fine-tuning-example
items.description: Fine-tuning 6-Billion GPT-J (& other models) with LoRA and 8-bit compression

items.name: RWKV-LM-RLHF
items.description: Reinforcement Learning Toolkit for RWKV.(v6,v7,ARWKV) Distillation,SFT,RLHF(DPO,ORPO), infinite context training, Aligning. Exploring the possibilities for deeper fine-tuning of RWKV.

items.name: Post-Training-Data-Flywheel
items.description: We aim to provide the best references to search, select, and synthesize high-quality and large-quantity data for post-training your LLMs.

items.name: L2M
items.description: Learning to Modulate pre-trained Models in RL (Decision Transformer, LoRA, Fine-tuning)

items.name: Awesome-Data-Efficient-LLM
items.description: A list of data-efficient and data-centric LLM (Large Language Model) papers. Our Survey Paper: Towards Efficient LLM Post Training: A Data-centric Perspective

items.name: finetune-whisper-lora
items.description: Fine-Tune Whisper with Transformers and PEFT

items.name: Fine-tuning-an-LLM-using-LoRA
items.description: 📚 Text Classification with LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation) of Language Models - Efficiently fine-tune large language models for text classification tasks using the Stanford Sentiment Treebank (SST-2) dataset and the LoRA technique.

items.name: lora-sb
items.description: Initialization using Update Approximation is a Silver Bullet for Extremely Efficient Low-Rank Fine-Tuning

items.name: skippipe
items.description: Open source code for the paper: SkipPipe: Partial and Reordered Pipelining Framework for Training LLMs in Heterogeneous Networks.

items.name: Principles-of-AI-LLMs
items.description: Materials for the course Principles of AI: LLMs at UPenn (Stat 9911, Spring 2025). LLM architectures, training paradigms (pre- and post-training, alignment), test-time computation, reasoning, safety and robustness (jailbreaking, oversight, uncertainty), representations, interpretability (circuits), etc.

items.name: VB-LoRA
items.description: This repo contains the source code for VB-LoRA: Extreme Parameter Efficient Fine-Tuning with Vector Banks (NeurIPS 2024).

items.name: mlx-tuning-fork
items.description: Very basic framework for composable parameterized large language model (Q)LoRA / (Q)Dora fine-tuning using mlx, mlx_lm, and OgbujiPT.

items.name: cs336_assignment-5
items.description: CS336 作业 5 实现, 附加作业里面的 dpo/rlhf 也完成了, 消融实验分析也放在飞书文档里面了, 仅供参考

items.name: TBA
items.description: Official implementation of TBA for async LLM post-training.
